info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a collection of interviews

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns a collection of interview records associated with job requisitions and candidates.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve feedback for an interview

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the feedback submitted for the specified interview.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a collection of job postings

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

params.name: search
params.description: Search string used to filter results

items.docs: Returns a collection of active and inactive job postings.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific job posting

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified job posting including description, requirements, and posting status.

items.docs: Returns the education history for the specified recruiting prospect.
